llm_operation.reason: MindSpore DepthToSpace only supports NCHW format, while TF uses NHWC by default. To align outputs, TF input must be reshaped to NCHW and data_format='NCHW', and MindSpore input shape must match NCHW: (N,C,H,W) = (1,12,12,12) → TF expects NHWC so original TF input is (1,12,12,12) meaning [N,H,W,C], thus C=12; for equivalent NCHW, TF input should be (1,12,12,12) with data_format='NCHW' meaning [N,C,H,W], but original shape has C=12, H=12, W=12 → valid. However, output shape mismatch (TF=(1,24,24,3) vs MS=(1,3,24,24)) reveals TF NHWC output is [N,H,W,C] while MS NCHW is [N,C,H,W]. So to compare same logical tensor, TF must use data_format='NCHW' and input shape interpreted as [N,C,H,W], matching MS.
